productDisplayName: Timex Men Grey Dial Watch T2E561
description: Article Number: T2E561Case style: Analogue watch with a circular case and stainless steel backDial style: Grey dial, textured, has silver toned hands with glow-in-the-dark inlays, silver toned seconds hand, silver toned markings and branding below the 12 hour markFeatures: Screw to reset the time, Indiglo night light, date and time aperture at the 3 hour markStrap style: Black leather strap, has stitched detail and secured with a tang claspWater resistant up to 50 mComes in a signature Timex caseWarranty: 1 year against manufacturing defects
